title: fix: route Klein to replacement RunPod pod
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Routes Klein fallback and production `KLEIN_URL` to replacement RunPod pod `jmrbmje2fyuy46`.
- Updates GPU inventory with the current A5000 pod, cost, URL, and SOPS SSH key note.
- Updates the Klein outage recovery runbook with the cheap-capacity guardrail, venv setup, token placement, secret push, and verification steps.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write gen.pollinations.ai/src/image/models/fluxKleinModel.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `sops -d gen.pollinations.ai/secrets/prod.vars.json | jq -r .KLEIN_URL`
- Verified production `model=klein` returned HTTP 200 JPEG after the secret push.

gist.headline: Klein gets a new pod
gist.blurb: We've swapped out the engine under the hood for the Klein image model. It's back up and running smoothly on a fresh RunPod instance.
gist.summary: Routed the Klein image model to a replacement RunPod A5000 instance (jmrbmje2fyuy46) and updated the outage recovery runbooks.
gist.impact: The `klein` model is fully restored and generating images again after a backend instance swap.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot wearing a hard hat, plugging a large glowing cable into a new chunky retro server rack. A monitor robot gives a thumbs up, celebrating the restored connection.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, plugging a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cable into a chunky retro server rack. A cute monitor-head robot stands nearby giving a thumbs up. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
